title: Assert `children[0]->type == AST_RANGE' failed in frontends/ast/genrtlil.cc:988
body:
Version `Yosys 0.7+627 (git sha1 e275692e, clang 6.0.1-2 -fPIC -Os)`.

Repro: [selftest.v.zip](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/2242246/selftest.v.zip); run `yosys selftest.v`.

Crash log:
```
Parsing Verilog input from `selftest.v' to AST representation.
Warning: Found one of those horrible `(synopsys|synthesis) translate_off' comments.
Yosys does support them but it is recommended to use `ifdef constructs instead!
Generating RTLIL representation for module `\top'.
ERROR: Assert `children[0]->type == AST_RANGE' failed in frontends/ast/genrtlil.cc:988.
```

I think the Verilog is fairly obviously illegal but it's still good to get a proper error.
code_blocks:
